creator: freebsd@mhka.no
text:
I'm creating this bug report to document the port is currently not buildable, and maintainer unreachable. It might be a temporary situation, but if not, we'll have a better idea what to do later.

This port seems to be unavailable. The master-sites entry doesn't respond to http(s) requests, and the ports maintainer (portmaster@BSDforge.com) is currently undeliverable because the provided MX records point to a server which doesn't accept smtp connections.
